title: Time-barred notices are void ab initio
text: A show cause notice issued beyond the limitation period prescribed under Section 73 or Section 74 of the CGST Act, 2017 is void ab initio and has no legal validity. The taxpayer is not required to respond to such a notice, and any consequent demand order passed on such notice is also invalid. The jurisdictional officer has no authority to issue a notice beyond the limitation period. If such a notice is received, the taxpayer may file a preliminary objection citing time-bar as the first ground of defense.
